description: Following the discovery that Volkswagen had installed software to cheat diesel emissions tests, public opinion plummeted globally. The company faced massive financial penalties and a total overhaul of its brand image, with stakeholders debating the efficacy of the leadership's apology and corrective measures.

key_events.description: EPA issues notice of violation regarding VW diesel emissions software.
VW admits to 'defeat device' usage in 11 million vehicles globally.
CEO Martin Winterkorn resigns amid global outrage.
Criminal charges filed against company executives in Germany and the US.

calibration_notes: Models the rapid collapse of public trust following evidence of systematic corporate fraud.
